---
name: Metadata Update Request
about: Propose or request an update to platform metadata and index entries
title: "[METADATA] <platform_id> - <field to update>"
labels: ["metadata-update"]
assignees: []
---

## Update Type
- [ ] New platform metadata entry
- [ ] Correction to existing metadata
- [ ] DOI link update
- [ ] Confidence level update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Platform Details
- Platform ID:
- Date(s) affected (YYYY-MM-DD, if applicable):
- Related file(s) (e.g., `platforms/<platform_id>/specs.yaml`, `main_data_index.csv`):

## Requested Metadata Changes
List each field and the proposed new value.

| Field | Current Value | Proposed Value | Justification |
|---|---|---|---|
| | | | |

## Scientific or Operational Justification
Explain why this change is needed and how it improves data quality or interpretation.

## Supporting References
Include DOI links, documentation, issue/PR links, or external references.

## Validation Checklist
- [ ] Values are consistent with platform documentation
- [ ] DOI links resolve correctly
- [ ] Date formats use YYYY-MM-DD
- [ ] Requested changes were reviewed by a platform contributor (if applicable)

## Additional Notes
Any context for maintainers and reviewers.
